name: Juxtaposition Ammunition
description:
Ammunition any

Activate 1 Interact

Juxtaposition ammunition quivers with anticipation, as if the projectile wishes to constantly be in motion. When an activated juxtaposition ammunition hits a creature, it doesn't deal the Strike's normal damage. Instead, the target must succeed at a save or be teleported to a safe, unoccupied square of your choice within 60 feet of its original position and within the weapon's first range increment. On a critical failure, the target is also Sickened 1 from the gut-wrenching sensation of sudden movement. Any relocation from the juxtaposition ammunition is forced movement.
